services.title: On-Site Tech Support
services.headline: In-home help when you need it.
services.summary: When the problem touches more than one device, account, or room, an in-person visit is often the fastest way to sort it out.

services.title: Virus & Malware Removal
services.headline: Remove infections and secure your system.
services.summary: We clean up infected systems, pop-ups, browser hijacks, and suspicious behavior, then walk through the steps that help keep it from happening again.

services.title: Wi-Fi & Network Setup
services.headline: Reliable Wi-Fi and network setup for homes and small offices.
services.summary: Set up or straighten out routers, mesh kits, access points, and wired connections so the network is stable, fast, and easier to live with.

services.title: Home Network Security & Wi-Fi Hardening
services.headline: Make your home Wi-Fi and connected devices safer without making them harder to use.
services.summary: Safer settings, guest access, device separation, and fewer risky defaults for homes and small offices that want more than a basic router setup.

services.title: Scam & Fraud Protection
services.headline: Practical help spotting scams and protecting yourself online.
services.summary: Calm, practical help after a scam scare or near miss, plus guidance on what to change so the same trick is less likely to work again.

services.title: Password Manager Setup & Account Safety
services.headline: Set up a password manager and clean up risky login habits.
services.summary: Get a password manager set up the right way and clean up weak or reused logins without making everyday access harder.

services.title: Computer Repair
services.headline: Help for slow, crashing, or non-booting computers.
services.summary: For slow, crashing, overheating, or non-booting computers, with honest repair guidance and a focus on protecting your files.

services.title: Data Recovery & Backup Help
services.headline: Recover important files and stop future loss.
services.summary: Help recovering deleted files or failing drives when possible, and building a backup plan that lowers the chance of going through it twice.

services.title: Laptop & PC Speed Upgrades
services.headline: Speed up a computer that is still worth keeping.
services.summary: Worth keeping the computer? Upgrades like SSDs, RAM, batteries, and cleanup can make it feel usable again.

services.title: Software Troubleshooting & Installs
services.headline: Fix Windows and Mac software problems without a full wipe.
services.summary: Fix messy installs, update failures, driver problems, login issues, and app crashes without jumping straight to a full reset.

services.title: Smart Home Setup & Security
services.headline: Set up cameras, doorbells, and smart devices with clearer privacy and fewer headaches.
services.summary: Set up cameras, doorbells, speakers, hubs, and routines so they are easier to use, more reliable, and less messy from a privacy and access standpoint.

services.title: Custom Technology Project Planning
services.headline: Start with a consultation when the job does not fit a standard service page.
services.summary: Start with a consultation for projects that need planning before anyone starts buying gear or changing the setup.
